code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{useAuth}from'../context/AuthContext';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AdminLogin=()=>{const[email,setEmail]=useState('');const[password,setPassword]=useState('');const{adminLogin}=useAuth();const navigate=useNavigate();const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();const success=await adminLogin(email,password);if(success){navigate('/admin');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"auth-screen auth-screen-admin",children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"auth-card",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{className:"auth-badge auth-badge-admin",children:"Admin access"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"auth-title",children:"Admin sign in"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"auth-subtitle",children:"This area is reserved for store managers only."}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{className:"mt-8 space-y-4",onSubmit:handleSubmit,children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"email",required:true,className:"input-field",placeholder:"Admin email",value:email,onChange:e=>setEmail(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",required:true,className:"input-field",placeholder:"Admin password",value:password,onChange:e=>setPassword(e.target.value)}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"btn-primary btn-primary-admin w-full",children:"Enter dashboard"})]})]})});};export default AdminLogin;
